svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="bench-architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-157" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="engineer_demo benchmark · 完整架构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="150" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="① Dock 建靶
target.json (本地 gitignored) · cp 自 target.json.example
索引: codegraph / cmm / graphify / mempalace
problems.json (gold 题库, tracked)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="200" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="② Run agent-compare
bench run agent-compare --engine sdk|raw
4 臂: no-kb · kb · kb+superpowers · kb+openspec
全局并发 pool=4" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="200" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="③ Agent loop (run_episode)
sdk: claude_agent_sdk query() · D7: tools=[] + setting_sources=[]
raw: 裸 anthropic messages.create loop
run-until-answer: backstop 30 (no-kb 12), 无 force-answer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="200" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="④ Judge
_judge: gold 符号 broad 子串匹配 · 零 LLM judge" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="500" x="200" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="⑤ Report
reports/agent-compare/<run>/ · result.md + summary.json + episodes
指标: accuracy · tokens (含 cache_read) · no_tool_rate · truncated_rate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="200" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#333333;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#333333;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#333333;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#333333;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 300px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 80px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① Dock 建靶
target.json (本地 gitignored) · cp 自 target.json.example
索引: codegraph / cmm / graphify / mempalace
problems.json (gold 题库, tracked)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② Run agent-compare
bench run agent-compare --engine sdk|raw
4 臂: no-kb · kb · kb+superpowers · kb+openspec
全局并发 pool=4

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 300px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ Agent loop (run_episode)
sdk: claude_agent_sdk query() · D7: tools=[] + setting_sources=[]
raw: 裸 anthropic messages.create loop
run-until-answer: backstop 30 (no-kb 12), 无 force-answer

④ Judge
